evidence: Validated against builds/protobuf-asan-arm64 using bugs/protobuf/delimited-size-int-overflow/poc/poc_real. Fresh run under ASAN_OPTIONS=detect_leaks=0 produced no AddressSanitizer report. Runtime output showed size_u32=2147483648, narrowed_size_i32=-2147483648, bytes_until_limit_after_push=-1, skip_remaining_succeeded=true, final_position=13, and evidence=overflowed size disables PushLimit enforcement in the real library. Exit code: 2.
